title: Red Diamond Armor and Tools
description: This mod adds in Armor and Tools better than Netherite.
body:
Red Diamond Armor and Tools



This mod offer a new set of armor and tools that are better than netherite.

The red diamond ore spawns in around -20 to -64

You can make a portal to a new dimension that has a lot more red diamond


You can craft the armor and tools like normal. You can also make a Red Diamond Apple. It gives a lot of buffs

Please show this mod some love.

This is my first ever mod still working out some stuff

Please let me know what type of stuff you would like to see added.
